problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Optical. Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion directly addresses this.
